ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Continued To Jul-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George K.T. Ong, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms that Petitioner acknowledges everything listed in the Duties and Liabilities and knows to open a separate estate account and keep assets segregated and fully insured, pay valid creditors, and not make any distributions unless ordered by the court. The Petitioner confirms that the mortgage on the real property is current.

The court confirms that there are no appearances to object to this petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. George K.T. Ong is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status of filing inventory and appraisal is set for Dec-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-22-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Continued To Aug-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
